title: σ AUROC Rescue: Model Size, Sample Count, and Signal Composition Ablation
notes: This harness calls Ollama HTTP directly for N i.i.d. completions at fixed T (not the mixed 0.1/0.7/1.5 cos shadow loop).
Semantic σ = 1 − mean pairwise Jaccard(first_sentence) over samples, with the same 0.95/0.05 clamps as cos_chat chat_multi_shadow for n=3.
Logprob σ = mean per-token normalized entropy from top_logprobs when the API returns them; else NaN (row skipped in logprob-only AUROC for that prompt).
n_samples=10 is supported at the HTTP layer; cos C semantic_entropy.c still caps at 8 for in-process paths — this experiment is intentionally HTTP-side.
Do not merge these numbers into flagship TruthfulQA claims without a repro bundle; diagnostic only.
